visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long black hair, wearing a brown puff-sleeve top, is in a Costco warehouse. She leans forward and bangs her head against a shelf stacked with curry boxes in an exaggerated, comedic manner while holding her hair. The lighting is bright and industrial. (2) She stands up, holding a large box of Formosa Chang Beef Potato Curry. She smiles brightly and speaks to the camera, gesturing towards the box with her free hand. Background objects include large pallets of packaged goods on metal shelving. (3) The scene transitions to a brightly lit indoor home setting. The woman is seated at a table next to another woman wearing a grey bucket hat and a similar brown top. The woman in the hat is eating curry and rice from a black plate using a silver spoon. (4) A macro close-up shows a spoon scooping into a pile of white rice covered in thick, brown curry sauce containing visible chunks of potato and beef. (5) The two women continue their discussion. They hold up silver foil retort pouches from the box. The woman in the hat makes exaggerated expressions of enjoyment while chewing, then points to her head at the end.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 好吃到頭撞到. (2) [Slogan]: 牛肉超大塊 料多又實在. [Variety]: ❤️❤️. [Slogan]: 最好吃咖哩. (3) [Subtitle]: 聽說是好市多最好吃的咖哩耶. (4) [Subtitle]: 200克有6包. (5) [Subtitle]: 總共339元. (6) [Subtitle]: 所以一包是多少. (7) [Subtitle]: 一包56元. (8) [Subtitle]: 馬鈴薯牛肉咖哩. [Variety]: ❤️❤️. (9) [Subtitle]: 完全不會辣. [Variety]: 🌸🌸. (10) [Subtitle]: 微波加熱2分鐘. (11) [Slogan]: 社團推薦最好吃的. [Variety]: ⚡️⚡️. (12) [Subtitle]: 真的. [Variety]: 遍地都贏它.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator in a brown top, 1 friend in a bucket hat joining later.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long, straight black hair, wearing a chocolate-brown ruffled puff-sleeve blouse and a long black skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first half is set in a Costco warehouse with tall metal racking, orange pillars, and bulk-packaged food products. The second half is a domestic interior with a grey countertop, some toys/clutter in the background, and warm lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched female shouting repeats '好吃到頭撞到' with high arousal and rhythmic delivery. Upbeat, fast-tempo electronic BGM with a strong percussive beat starts immediately. (2) Vocal tone shifts to a bright narrative style with clear articulation. Occasional 'Ding' and 'Pop' SFX occur as text graphics appear on screen. (3) A second female voice joins in a conversational, friendly register. Sound of a metallic spoon clinking against a ceramic plate is clearly audible. (4) A 'Whoosh' transition SFX marks a cut to a close-up. The first female speaker continues detailing the price per pack in an informative tone. (5) Sound of plastic crinkling as they handle retort pouches. The second speaker makes an enthusiastic humming sound. (6) The second speaker jokingly states she prefers 7-11 curry, causing the first speaker's tone to shift to a playful, shocked gasp/exclamation.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to review a 'Formosa Chang' beef curry product sold at Costco Taiwan. It uses a comedic hook (banging head on shelf) to grab attention, provides logistical details like price and contents, demonstrates the ease of preparation, and concludes with a humorous contrast in personal preference between the two hosts.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product packaging, mention of price, and specific store location (Costco).

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video combines typical 'variety show' editing styles (bright captions, sound effects) with a humorous, relatable vlog aesthetic to engage local consumers.
